name: copilot-chat-porter
description: Let GitHub Copilot Chat export and import its own conversation history via natural language

languageModelTools.name: exportChatHistory
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Exports the current Copilot Chat session history (all user messages, AI responses, file references, tool calls) as a JSON file to the workspace. Call this tool when the user asks to save, export, or dump the current conversation/chat history. Returns the exported JSON content so you can also reformat it (e.g. to markdown) before saving.

outputPath.description: Relative path (from workspace root) to save the exported JSON file. Example: 'exports/chat-2024-03-07.json'. If omitted, auto-generates a timestamped filename in the workspace root.

languageModelTools.name: importChatHistory
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Imports and restores a previously exported Copilot Chat session from a JSON file. Call this tool when the user asks to restore, load, or resume a previous conversation from a saved chat history file. The session will be opened in a new chat tab.

inputPath.description: Relative path (from workspace root) to the chat history JSON file to import. Example: 'exports/chat-2024-03-07.json'
